Elsholtzia ciliata, also known as Elcismia laricifolia, is a medicinal plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Elsholtzia ciliata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Elsholtzia ciliata include tea, capsules, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory problems and other health conditions.
